name: AI-Readiness Score Pro
description: AI-Readiness Score Pro audits up to 10,000 URLs per month against ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews, then prioritizes the fixes that move citation share fastest.

review.reviewBody: We added 32 of the recommended FAQ blocks across our pillar pages and saw Perplexity citations climb from 14 to 41 mentions per week within a month. The diff view that compares your page against the top-cited competitor is the killer feature.
Solid tool for content teams. The schema validator caught three Article objects we had shipped without dateModified. One nit: the API rate limit is tight on the Pro tier for sites with 5,000+ URLs.
